---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command: `...`
2. See error: `...`

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include full error output).

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.2, Windows 11)
- **Rust version:** `rustc --version`
- **AIMF version:** `aimf --version` or commit hash
- **Installation method:** (built from source, cargo install, binary download)

## Additional context
- Screenshots
- Input files (if small enough to paste, or link to gist)
- Related issues

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I can reproduce this with a fresh clone
- [ ] I have included the exact command and output
